title: Kernel VM
description: Run a ChainGraph decision kernel's compute(policy_parameters) inside a sandboxed, hermetic, in-browser QuickJS-ng WebAssembly VM under the ocg-deterministic-compute@2 profile (SPEC.md section 24) and inspect its execution_hash. Phase VM-1b: a custom guest-pinned build of quickjs-ng v0.15.1 (the exact revision in the zkVM guest), with the deterministic WebCrypto subset (section 24.5) and full native BigInt; zero-fetch, no CDN. Ships a small curated set of demo kernels; every conformance-fixtured gpu:false kernel is checked automatically in CI by chaingraph/kernels/vm-parity-gate.mjs, which diffs this same VM's execution_hash against the worker's own kernel registry.

tool_id.description: One of the curated demo kernel tool_ids shipped in this widget.

mcp_tool_definition.name: run_kernel_vm
mcp_tool_definition.description: Run a ChainGraph decision kernel's compute(policy_parameters) inside a sandboxed, deterministic, in-browser QuickJS-ng WebAssembly VM (ocg-deterministic-compute@2) and return its output_payload. Demo kernel set only -- for the full catalog, use the worker's compute kernels directly.
